message:
chore: update formula contents for tru -> toon rename

Update asset URLs, binary names, and deprecation messages to reflect
the tru -> toon binary rename. File renaming (tru.rb -> toon.rb) is
deferred pending explicit permission.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -2,15 +2,15 @@
 # frozen_string_literal: true
 
 class Tr < Formula
-  desc "Deprecated: renamed to tru to avoid conflict with coreutils tr"
+  desc "Deprecated: renamed to toon to avoid conflict with coreutils tr"
   homepage "https://github.com/Dicklesworthstone/toon_rust"
   url "https://github.com/Dicklesworthstone/toon_rust/archive/refs/tags/v0.1.0.tar.gz"
   sha256 "08b6c166045886a6670baad0383511d5934e7ef1c6cb66bfa5492aa2f9be9d18"
   license "MIT"
 
-  disable! date: "2026-01-24", because: "renamed to tru to avoid conflict with coreutils tr"
+  disable! date: "2026-01-24", because: "renamed to toon to avoid conflict with coreutils tr"
 
   def install
-    odie "tr has been renamed to tru. Install with: brew install tru"
+    odie "tr has been renamed to toon. Install with: brew install toon"
   end
 end

@@ -9,35 +9,35 @@ class Tru < Formula
 
   on_macos do
     on_intel do
-      url "https://github.com/Dicklesworthstone/toon_rust/releases/download/v#{version}/tru-darwin-amd64.tar.xz"
+      url "https://github.com/Dicklesworthstone/toon_rust/releases/download/v#{version}/toon-darwin-amd64.tar.xz"
       sha256 "12733939163d71ef321da2cd9924eb994d51d3000200415d3370f8a194b6c7b6"
     end
     on_arm do
-      url "https://github.com/Dicklesworthstone/toon_rust/releases/download/v#{version}/tru-darwin-arm64.tar.xz"
+      url "https://github.com/Dicklesworthstone/toon_rust/releases/download/v#{version}/toon-darwin-arm64.tar.xz"
       sha256 "047394c0457e6a134bb1e953c91e39d1e4ec85996a8ddc9924332fce525d9d6c"
     end
   end
 
   on_linux do
     on_intel do
-      url "https://github.com/Dicklesworthstone/toon_rust/releases/download/v#{version}/tru-linux-amd64.tar.xz"
+      url "https://github.com/Dicklesworthstone/toon_rust/releases/download/v#{version}/toon-linux-amd64.tar.xz"
       sha256 "95ebf53061d86c0a0cb2e4ad1e4227ced8a05975a4de72d8398e49062163ad70"
     end
     on_arm do
-      url "https://github.com/Dicklesworthstone/toon_rust/releases/download/v#{version}/tru-linux-arm64.tar.xz"
+      url "https://github.com/Dicklesworthstone/toon_rust/releases/download/v#{version}/toon-linux-arm64.tar.xz"
       sha256 "ff7b25b10358ad96eaa204632b746033a014cffb8b71352132e9768678457acf"
     end
   end
 
   def install
-    bin.install "tru"
+    bin.install "toon"
   end
 
   test do
-    output = pipe_output("#{bin}/tru --encode", '{"test": true}')
+    output = pipe_output("#{bin}/toon --encode", '{"test": true}')
     assert_match "test: true", output
 
-    decoded = pipe_output("#{bin}/tru --decode", output)
+    decoded = pipe_output("#{bin}/toon --decode", output)
     assert_match "\"test\"", decoded
   end
 end
